title: Birthday Celebrations
name: Anna Kolyada, Mikhail Ladutko & Armaan Pandher
message: The whole team is sending warm wishes and celebrating these amazing colleagues today!
teamNote: Anna leads our daily yoga sessions, Mikhail brings technical excellence, and Armaan adds fresh energy to the team

title: Engineering Excellence
headline: Scorecard Automation Breakthrough
description: Engineering metrics scorecards are being finalized across key teams, with automation targeting completion by end of day. This shift from manual tracking to AI-driven insights represents a major step toward data-driven performance management.

title: Data Precision Victory
headline: January Marks Historic Data Accuracy
description: Achieved historically minimal spend discrepancies in January, with automated LTV system launch planned in 12 weeks.
takeaway: Our relentless focus on data precision is paying off with unprecedented accuracy levels

title: Strategic Pivot
headline: Margin Testing Optimization
description: Teams are shifting focus to higher-performing segments like Business Empire for better advertiser ROAS, while creating comprehensive documentation frameworks for future learning.

title: Revenue Acceleration
headline: Aggressive Growth Strategy Deployed
description: Daily ad spend jumped from €2k to €10k to close a €25k profit gap, with Minesweeper achieving stable 256% ROAS on Android.
takeaway: Bold moves in advertising are delivering strong returns and closing profit gaps fast

title: Peer Appreciation
reason: Exceptional teamwork and dedication to quality

title: Global Operations
description: New end-to-end relocation platform being introduced to streamline employee relocations globally, especially to Barcelona. Focus on improving timing and employee experience.

title: AI Revolution
headline: AI-Powered Performance Reviews
description: Transitioning from formal calibrations to manager-led evaluations supported by AI insights, ensuring fairness and accuracy in performance assessments across all teams.

title: Product Innovation
headline: Version 5.5.0 Rollout Success
description: Successfully rolled out to 10% of users with version 5.6.0 targeted for March 27, featuring key improvements and optimizations.
takeaway: Consistent product iterations are driving user experience improvements

title: Technical Architecture
description: Integrating experimentation platform while Rust rewrite progresses, with solution design document guiding decisions for smoother migration later.

title: Leadership Focus
headline: Performance Review Kickoff
quote: Performance review kicks off today! We're keeping things light and focused with just 3 manager questions and self-assessments covering performance, culture, and psychological safety.
author: Lise Brandely

title: Engineering Standards
headline: Security & Deployment Excellence
description: Teams are making great progress building products and tools, especially non-engineering teams creating useful solutions. Now focusing on proper engineering and security practices as we scale, moving to managed deployments for better reliability.

title: Gaming Success
headline: Screw Twist Performance Boost
description: Version 1.3.5 launched with new onboarding levels and increased interstitial ad frequency, targeting improved retention and reduced churn.
takeaway: Strategic product updates are directly translating to revenue growth

title: Cross-Team Excellence
reason: Outstanding project delivery and team collaboration

title: Product Excellence
headline: TV Monkey Model Deployed
description: Forecast model successfully integrated with acquisition team, including bundle ID, network, and country data for future precision testing and improved campaign optimization.

title: Innovation Mindset
headline: Build, Ship, Improve Culture
quote: It's especially exciting to see how quickly non-engineering teams have created so many useful tools. This is a strong sign that we're learning fast and moving in the right direction.
author: Leadership Team

title: UA Excellence
headline: UA Playbook Optimization
description: New health rate metric for UA activities developed with revisions aimed at optimizing user acquisition and improving accuracy across campaigns.
takeaway: Data-driven approaches to user acquisition are becoming more sophisticated

title: Team Spirit
headline: March Birthday Celebration
prompt1: What's your favorite way to celebrate team milestones?
prompt2: How do you make remote colleagues feel included in office celebrations?
coreValue: We work TOGETHER to serve others

title: AI Integration
headline: AI-Powered Company Growth
description: Every employee will manage 5-10 AI agents within 3-6 months as part of our vision to build toward a $50B company with 1,500 employees and 100 studios.

title: Automation Success
headline: OKR Auditor AI Excellence
description: Our AI-powered OKR Auditor now checks over 1,000 individual OKRs daily, ensuring alignment and progress tracking across the entire organization.
takeaway: AI is transforming how we maintain organizational focus and accountability

title: Gaming Profitability
headline: Gaming Division Turns Profitable
description: Gaming achieved profitability in 2025 with Infinite Minesweeper reaching 61% retention and Crossword exceeding 200% ROAS, marking a major milestone in our diversification strategy.

title: Security Excellence
headline: Fraud Prevention Breakthrough
description: Fraud reduced from 22% to under 4% with dynamic SDK signatures, dramatically improving platform security and user trust.
takeaway: Our innovative security measures are setting new industry standards

title: Sales Performance
headline: Record Sales Week
description: Sales team closed 8 deals generating $390k net revenue in a single week, demonstrating strong market momentum and effective sales strategies.
